name: VR Resources Ltd.
description: VR Resources Ltd. is an established junior mineral exploration company focused on greenfields opportunities in critical metals, copper, and gold. Based in Vancouver, the company utilizes a prospect-generator model enhanced by artificial intelligence and modern exploration science to identify and advance high-potential projects. Their primary operations are located in the western United States and Canada, where they aim to unlock value through systematic exploration and drilling. With a management team experienced in large-scale M&A, VR Resources is committed to sustainable exploration practices while targeting significant mineral discoveries to support the global green energy transition.
